name: vtp-voice-prompt
description: Speech-to-prompt for Antigravity. Dictate, enhance with Gemini, and fire prompts into Antigravity — entirely by voice.

vtp.vadMode.description: (Legacy) Enable always-on voice activity detection mode. Use vtp.conversationMode instead.

enumDescriptions: Say your wake phrase to start recording (e.g. "hey antigravity").
Press the button or keybind to start recording (Push to Talk).
vtp.activationMode.description: How a new recording session is started.

enumDescriptions: Mic auto-restarts after each send so you can keep dictating immediately.
Mic goes idle after each send. Use your activation method to start the next prompt.
vtp.postSendMode.description: What happens after a prompt is sent.

vtp.wakePhrase.description: The phrase to say to start recording (when activationMode is 'wake').

vtp.contextDepth.description: Number of recent conversation messages to pass as context

vtp.elaborationModel.description: Gemini model used for prompt elaboration

enumDescriptions: Built-in Gemini chunked transcription (default, no extra setup required)
Optional Deepgram real-time streaming (~300ms latency, requires free Deepgram API key)
vtp.transcriptionEngine.description: Transcription engine. Deepgram is a 3rd-party optional service that significantly reduces transcription latency. Your Deepgram API key is stored only in VS Code SecretStorage on this machine.

vtp.deepgramMipOptOut.description: Opt out of the Deepgram Model Improvement Program. When true, Deepgram will not use your audio to train their models (mip_opt_out=true). The free-tier 50% MIP discount is removed when opted out. Managed via the Deepgram Privacy Settings menu.

vtp.deepgramRedact.description: Sensitive data types to redact from Deepgram transcripts. Redacted values are replaced with [redacted]. Options: pci (payment data), pii (names/addresses), numbers (all numerics), ssn (Social Security Numbers). Managed via the Deepgram Privacy Settings menu.

vtp.deepgramProfanityFilter.description: When enabled, Deepgram replaces recognised profanity in the returned transcript with [censored]. Managed via the Deepgram Privacy Settings menu.

vtp.voiceActivation.enabled.description: When true, VTP listens in the background for the wake phrase and starts recording automatically when it is detected.

vtp.voiceActivation.wakePhrase.description: The wake phrase VTP listens for when voice activation is enabled. Shorter phrases (e.g. 'hey vtp') are easier to trigger reliably.

scripts.release: npm run build && vsce package --out vtp-voice-prompt.vsix && vsce publish --packagePath vtp-voice-prompt.vsix && ovsx publish vtp-voice-prompt.vsix -p %OVSX_TOKEN%
